rationale.R1.6: The rewrite addresses many of the writing issues identified in the original text and provides a clearer structure with well-defined paragraphs.
rationale.RX.1: While the rewrite improves readability, it still contains some run-on sentences and vague phrasing that could be further refined.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers the agreed-upon active set without significant drift or omissions.
rationale.RX.4: The rewrite avoids introducing new errors, harmful content, or regressions from the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, though some cross-references are placeholders.
